sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101646" key="sfendoni/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφενδον-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n101646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σφενδονάω, βολίδας</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:2:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
